description: When the EmptyNoteDiscarded path is taken, pipeline.ts lines 68-78 fabricate a NoteFileSaved event object and return it as Ok. This is semantically incorrect: the note was never saved to disk, yet the caller receives a NoteFileSaved-shaped value. Per REQ-017, EmptyNoteDiscarded is handled internally, but the chosen encoding misleads callers into believing a file was written. Additionally, this fabricated NoteFileSaved is never published to the event bus, creating an inconsistency: the return value says 'note-file-saved' but no such event was emitted.
